assertions.title: Authenticated requests receive a Bedrock or Z.AI response through the gateway

steps.expected: Guest auth UI loads with Register/Sign In buttons
steps.observed: Guest auth UI displayed correctly with WebAuthn passkey registration form

steps.action: Set up virtual WebAuthn authenticator via Playwright CDP
steps.expected: Virtual authenticator ready for passkey registration

steps.action: Register new test user with passkey
steps.expected: Passkey registration completes, user created in auth DB
Session shows authenticated: true with user identity
steps.observed: Session authenticated successfully with user ID and username

steps.action: Reload to reach authenticated desktop shell
steps.expected: Shell UI loads with working runtime prompt interface
steps.observed: Desktop shell rendered but shows 'Bootstrap failed (502)' - VM backend unavailable

steps.expected: Task flows through proxy → VM → gateway → Z.AI → UI response
steps.observed: Task submission failed with 502 error - VM kernel panic prevents runtime from starting

steps.action: Verify VM boots and runtime accepts tasks
steps.expected: VM boots successfully, runtime health passes, task completes
steps.observed: VM fails to boot - kernel panic 'Requested init /bin/init failed (error -2)'

evidence.gatewayLogs: gateway: issued credential for sandbox vm-1596800d1e653ec73948836bef28e9e5 (expires=2026-04-12 00:53:41)
evidence.vmctlLogs: Kernel panic - not syncing: Requested init /bin/init failed (error -2). EXT4-fs (vda): mounted filesystem successfully but init execution fails. virtio-mmio device probe errors with EBUSY (-16).

assertions.issues: VM kernel panic prevents end-to-end flow completion. The guest rootfs has /bin/init (verified via debugfs - inode 26, size 3690 bytes, mode 0555) but kernel reports ENOENT (-2) when trying to execute it. virtio-mmio device registration fails with EBUSY (-16) errors. Gateway and auth services healthy.

frictions.description: WebAuthn/passkey authentication requires Playwright with virtual authenticator setup - agent-browser alone cannot complete registration
frictions.resolution: Used existing Playwright test suite with CDP virtual authenticator

frictions.description: Playwright test expects [data-task-status] element but UI shows 502 errors instead of task runner
frictions.resolution: Underlying VM infrastructure issue - not a test problem

blockers.description: Firecracker VM kernel panic on boot: 'Requested init /bin/init failed (error -2)'. The rootfs appears correct (verified via debugfs) but kernel cannot execute /bin/init. Additional virtio-mmio probe failures with EBUSY (-16). This prevents any runtime task execution.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified /bin/init exists in guest rootfs (inode 26, 3690 bytes, mode 0555). Restarted vmctl service. New VMs still panic with same error.

summary: Test blocked by VM infrastructure issue. Authentication and gateway services are healthy. The end-to-end flow cannot complete because Firecracker VMs fail to boot with kernel panic when executing /bin/init. File exists in rootfs (verified) but kernel reports ENOENT. Requires investigation of guest kernel config or rootfs image generation.
